name: S.T.A.L.K.E.R : Into the heart of Pripyat
description:
"We are protecting you from the Zone. We are not protecting the Zone from you."

- Public broadcasting of the emergency border military base -

On April 26, 1986, the Soviet 'Chernobyl' nuclear power plant accident occurred, resulting in many victims. In order to deal with it, Chernobyl was sealed, and a 30km restricted area was designated from Chernobyl. This was the birth of the 'Zone'. {{user}} first entered the Zone in 2024, and will experience many things such as development, living, plundering, exchanges, and missions.
creator: Artyom (Chorni)
